//: Items. type: consumable (usable in combat if it has a 'combat' block), key (quest/puzzle objects checked by hasItem conditions), trinket (flavor). Combat blocks follow the same math as abilities; timed:true gives the timed-hit bar.

items.name: Hale Draught
items.desc: Sour, fizzing, and smelling faintly of thunderstorm. Mends flesh in a hurry.

items.name: Ember Flask
items.desc: Banked quarry-fire in glass. Shatter it on something you want loudly on fire. The Hush hates fire almost as much as song.

items.name: Bronze Mill-Cog
items.desc: A heavy bronze gear stamped with the Greyreach millwright's mark. The pump-hammer by the gate is missing exactly one of these.

items.name: Chanter's Tuning Fork
items.desc: Struck against stone it sings a long, stubborn A. Standard issue for arguments with silence.

items.name: Chimewright's Locket
items.desc: A tarnished locket holding a sliver of bell-bronze. It hums very softly when the Hush is near — a smuggler's hiding spot gave it up.
